prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young woman with long wavy chestnut-brown hair standing beside a tall apartment window during golden-hour sunset. She faces the camera calmly with a soft neutral expression, natural makeup, and relaxed posture, holding one red plastic party cup with both hands at waist level. She wears a dark navy retro American football jersey with large cream numbers “32” on the front and matching sleeve numbers, thin gold outlines and sleeve stripes, paired with high-waisted blue jeans. The setting is a high-rise apartment gathering: warm indoor party atmosphere behind her with exactly three blurred background people visible, one woman in a black strappy top with her back turned, one man in a white shirt and dark cap holding a bottle, and one partially obscured guest between them. Compose her centered slightly right, leaning near the window frame, with a sunlit city skyline visible outside to the right. Use warm golden sunlight streaming through the glass, soft haze, lens flare with a subtle rainbow streak in the lower left, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, realistic fabric details, candid editorial photography style, 35mm film look, warm amber color grading, high dynamic range, and no visible watermark or added text.
